description: Evaluated on energy, persuasion, and narrative momentum.

feedback_templates.energy_consistency: Energy consistency scored {value:.2f}. Pitches need dynamic vocal energy to hold attention.
feedback_templates.sentiment_score: Sentiment strength is {value:.2f}. Use more emotionally charged, positive language.
feedback_templates.keyword_density: Problem/solution keyword density is {value:.2f}. Name the problem and your fix clearly.
